urdu transliteration text:
YA FATEMA RIDA ME CHUPA LO
YA FATIMA RIDA MEIN CHUPA LO HUSSAIN KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Fatema, cover him with your rida O Fatema, cover Hussain with your rida

urdu transliteration text:
MAQTAL MEIN GIR RAHA HAI SANBHALO HUSSAIN(AS) KO. YA FATIMA RIDA MEIN CHUPA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: He is falling in the battlefield, please look after Hussain. O Fatema, cover Hussain with your rida.

urdu transliteration text:
PAIWAST HAI GHAREEB KE PEHLU MEIN BARCHIYAAN.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Arrows are embedded in his side.

urdu transliteration text:
TUM KO BHI UTHNE DETI NAHI TOOTI PASLIYAAN. LE KAR ALI(AS) KA NAAM UTHA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Your broken ribs would also not allow you to stand. Take the name of Ali and help Hussain stand up

urdu transliteration text:
DEEWAR-O-DAR KE BEECH JO ARMAN REH GAYE. RAKHI HOI THI DILL MEIN JO MOHSIN(AS) KE WASTAY.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The desires in your heart, that you had for Mohsin. Which were left between the wall and the door.

urdu transliteration text:
WOH LORIYAAN BHI AAJ SUNA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Please recite those lullabies for Hussain today.

He has been thirsty for 4 days, and is taking his last breath
SOLAH PEHAR KI PIYAS HAI OUR HAI LABOON PE DAM.

urdu transliteration text:
DE KAR GHAREEB BETE KO ABBAS(AS) KI QASAM. PANI AGAR MILE TU PILA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Give the promise of Abbas to your son. If you find water, please bring it to Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
SHEH KI GHAREEB BETI KE ARMAN KI TARHA. GODI MEIN LE KE TEESRI SHABAN KI TARHA. KUCH DAIR HO SAKE TU SULA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Just like Sakina's hopes. Just like the third of Shaban, take Hussain in your lap and let him sleep there for a bit.

Haider (a.s.) is trembling and the Prophet is restless
HAIDER(AS) TARAP RAHE HAIN PAYAMBER(SAWW) HAIN BE-QARAR.

urdu transliteration text:
TUM KAISE SUN RAHI HO SADAEIN YEH BAR BAR. IK SHOOR HAI ZAMEEN PE GIRA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How can you repeatedly listen to the cries for help. There is noise from the ground, calling to fell Hussain.

urdu transliteration text:
ACHE NAHI IRADAY YAZEEDI(L) SIPAH KE. PAON NIKAL RAHE HAIN RAKABOON SE SHAH(AS) KE.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Yazeed’s soldiers have bad intentions. Hussain's feet are slipping out of the stirrups.

urdu transliteration text:
GHAZI(AS) NAHI HAI TUM HI SANBHALO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Abbas is not here so you must take care of Hussain (a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
ZAINAB(SA) SADA YEH DETI HAI AYE BE-QARAR MAA,  ZAKHMOON KO MILL KE BANDHEIN GI HAIDER(AS) KI BETIYAAN.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Zainab cries "oh restless mother, The daughters of Haider will cover the wounds together"

urdu transliteration text:
KHAIMAY MEIN AIK BAR BULA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO. RONE LAGI AYE :MIR TAKALLUM: WOH GHAMZADAH
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Call Hussain to the tent just once. Grief-stricken, she began to cry (this one is a bit rough...)

urdu transliteration text:
PHAILA KE APNE HATH JO SHABIR(AS) NE KAHA. GODI MEIN THORI DAIR SULA LO HUSSAIN(AS) KO.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Spreading his hands, Shabir said, let Hussain sleep in your lap for a little bit.

urdu transliteration text:
Tumhare Dost Pe Khanjar Chalaya Jaye Ga.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: A dagger will slit the throat of your friend

urdu transliteration text:
Nahi Hai Waqt Zyada Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: There is not much time left, O Habib please come to me
